name: strength
description: Strength represents physical power. Directly impacts physical damage dealt.

name: stamina
description: Stamina represents one's endurance. Directly impacts maximum health.

name: agility
description: Agility represents one's speed and dexterity. Directly impacts evasion and accuracy.

name: intelligence
description: Intelligence represents one's mental acuity and ability to learn and understand. Directly impacts maximum mana and ability power.

name: willpower
description: Willpower represents one's mental fortitude and ability to resist mental effects. Directly impacts resistance to status effects.
